response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified 4 songs from on-screen text: "エアーマンが倒せない" (Team Nekokan), "ロボのテーマ" (Yasunori Mitsuda), "カエルのテーマ" (Yasunori Mitsuda), and "Melodies of Life" (Nobuo Uematsu).
2. Determined "Robo no Theme" and "Kaeru no Theme" are instrumental covers in this context.
3. Used DuckDuckGo to search for lyrics for "エアーマンが倒せない" and "Melodies of Life" using the template "[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics".
4. Mapped scenes based on the song transitions and visual breaks.
5. Generated the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 4-song dance performance by VTubers Hakata Koyori and Sakura Miko (with Tsunomaki Watame joining in the last song), featuring both vocal songs and instrumental dance covers of video game themes.

scenes.description: Hakata Koyori and Sakura Miko perform a dance routine to "Airman ga Taosenai".
scenes.song_title: エアーマンが倒せない
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイ
そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
諦めずに消える足場に挑戦するけど
すぐに下におちるよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I realize it, I'm only playing the same level
And I always die in the same place
I try challenging the vanishing platforms without giving up
But I immediately fall down below.

scenes.description: Transition scene featuring an animated pocket watch.
Hakata Koyori dances to an instrumental cover of "Robo no Theme".
Hakata Koyori dances to an instrumental cover of "Kaeru no Theme".
Transition scene featuring a fantasy town and airship.
Hakata Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame sing "Melodies of Life".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
果てもなく彷徨っていた
手がかりもなく探し続けた
あなたがくれた思い出を
心を癒す
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I was wandering endlessly
Searching without a clue
The memories you gave me
Heal my heart.
